title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.775 - Daniel Boone Highway designated for a portion of State Highway F in St. Charles County
text:
227.775.  Daniel Boone Highway designated for a portion of State Highway F in St. Charles County. — The portion of State Highway F from State Highway 94 continuing west to Femme Osage Creek Road in St. Charles County shall be designated as "Daniel Boone Highway".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such highway, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2022 H.B. 1738 merged with H.B. 2627)
